final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical exploded-view diagram of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical illustration aesthetic suitable for educational/instructional use — exact rendering style is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all components separated and clearly visible
Subject: must include all internal and external parts of a Sony A7 camera with their names labeled
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean neutral background — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a technical diagram surface treatment — exact material rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "Sony A7" and all component names in Spanish (sensor, mirrorless mount, shutter mechanism, image processor, battery, SD card slot, viewfinder, LCD screen, dials, buttons, grip, lens mount, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve technical accuracy of Sony A7 camera anatomy, all major components must be visible and labeled
Avoid:
